Event: Magic Well - January 2025

Sage Bot Item Code: T80

Peacock Emerald Totem

Once in a while, the unit deals 200000 magic damage to all enemies in a large radius around the unit. Also, the totem owner additionally deals 50000 magic damage to all enemies in a large radius around the unit for each mage on the battlefield.

Requirements: 90
